title: salvia miltiorrhiza var. miltiorrhiza
intro: Salvia miltiorrhiza var. miltiorrhiza, also known as Chinese sage or red sage, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to improve circulation, lower blood pressure, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Salvia miltiorrhiza var. miltiorrhiza include its potential to treat cardiovascular conditions, such as coronary heart disease and arrhythmia, as well as its anti-aging and antioxidant properties. Salvia miltiorrhiza var. miltiorrhiza is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
